title: Iridescent Organza Ribbons - Sheer Chiffon Gift Wrapping Ribbons for Bridal Bouquet, Wedding Decorations - White, 50 Yards
features: The chiffon fabric of the satin ribbon is bendable, transparent and light, and displays into iridescent ribbons, which can reflect the colorful luster under the light
The sheer chiffon ribbon can be used to make gift box packaging decoration, bouquet packaging, wedding wrapping and decoration
Design work well for any occasions - birthday, baby shower, congrats, wedding, and holiday flower packing, a must for flower shops
description: This JIHUOO product is a 50 yard iridescent organza ribbon, ideal for a variety of uses. The ribbon is made of thread material and has a width of 4 cm. The chiffon fabric of the satin ribbon is sheer, flexible and lightweight, and shows a colorful sheen under the light thanks to its iridescent finish. The ribbon can be used for a variety of purposes, such as gift box packaging decoration, bouquet packaging, wedding wrapping and decoration. Its classic design and versatility in terms of occasions make it a must-have choice for flower shops and a perfect addition to any special event, such as birthdays, baby shower, congratulations and weddings. The dimensions of the tape are 50 yards long, making it long enough for large projects. In addition, the ribbon can be hand washed with cold water and it is recommended to hang dry.
